variants: Arva James, an expert in hydrogeology, has dedicated her career to understanding groundwater systems and their ecological implications. Under the mentorship of Mathilde Favreau, she enhanced her research methodologies, allowing her to explore the intricate relationships between water and environment more deeply. In addition to her scientific pursuits, Arva is a proud member of the Nightingale Origami Exchange, where she combines her passion for art with her scientific insights. The research she conducts is primarily funded through the Millstone Kinetics Grant, which facilitates her innovative projects. Arva also holds a Runestone Engraver Warrant, showcasing her diverse skills that span both scientific and artistic realms.
